releaseRecommendation.summary: StagePilot is strong enough for frontier review conversations as long as watch items stay explicit and bounded.
releaseRecommendation.nextStep: Promote provider, trace, and perf evidence together; keep mixed-format multiline outputs and XML boundary repair as watch areas.

gates.signal: Provider scorecard plus protocol matrix cover openai-compatible, anthropic-xml-style, gemini-hybrid, and local-oss families.
Trace observability artifact has four replayable traces and zero failed gates.
Gemini-hybrid multiline indentation drift is bounded but still deserves reviewer-visible watch status.
Anthropic-style XML close-tag repair is stable enough for review but should remain explicit before stronger production claims.
k6 perf artifact and route guardrails stay consistent with the current benchmark-backed story.
